---
title: "Bob Week"
output: 
  html_document: 
    theme: cosmo
    css: style.css
---

<!--<img src="images/users/meprof.jpg" height="150" width="150" border="0"/>-->

I am a student at the University of Idaho working on a PhD under professor [Scott Nuismer](http://www.webpages.uidaho.edu/~snuismer/Nuismer_Lab/). My degree program is [Bioinformatics and Computational Biology](http://www.uidaho.edu/sci/bcb) (BCB) which is housed within [The Institute for Bioinformatics and Evolutionary Studies](http://www.ibest.uidaho.edu/) (IBEST). 

My research focuses on using quantitative genetic theory to investigate the evolutionary stability of biological communities. To do this I develop rigorous mathematical models of phenotypic evolution that incorporate species interactions and methods for inferring parameters of these models.

My CV is available [here](files/cv.pdf).
